name: candyco-mrp
description: CandyCo procurement MRP tools. Given a finished-good item number, explodes its multi-level NetSuite BOM and produces a consolidated ~30-week time-phased MRP view (Forecast / Demand / Planned_Demand / Planned_Supply / Ending) for every purchased component (raw materials + packaging) on one page — as both an Excel workbook and an HTML dashboard. Replaces the manual item-by-item 'MRP Consolidated Report - Weekly Copy & Paste' process. Validated cell-for-cell on FG 21125 (bar) and 30804-Case12 (case-pack); confirm against your manual output on first runs.
